sys_script_include.description: Central transition-guard helper for the case state-machine. Provides canTransitionToOpen/canTransitionToInProgress/canTransitionToResolved/canTransitionToClosed, validateNoBacktransition, isAgentInGroup, and getOpenTaskCountForCase. Called by all Flow Designer flows, Business Rules, and UI Actions in the x_casemgmt scope. ServiceNow-native equivalent of ArkCase ChangeCaseFileStateService. All transition rules and verbatim error messages are traced to AAP Section 0.5.5 and 0.7.4. canTransitionToResolved blocks the In Progress -> Resolved transition with the verbatim message "All tasks must be closed before resolving this case." when any child x_casemgmt_case_task has status != Closed. validateNoBacktransition blocks any -> Draft with the verbatim message "Cases cannot be returned to Draft." and Closed -> * with the verbatim message "Closed cases are terminal and cannot be modified." Role checks use gs.getUser().hasRole(role_name) only. Group-membership checks use GlideRecord on sys_user_grmember (read-only). Open-task counting uses GlideAggregate on x_casemgmt_case_task. Contains zero hardcoded sys_id literals in references and zero gs.eventQueue() calls per the email-disabled constraint.
sys_script_include.name: CaseTransitionValidator
